# Pickle Brewing — LLM Context File

## Business Name
Pickle Brewing

## What We Do
Pickle Brewing supplies beginners with everything they need to start homebrewing.
We sell beginner-friendly brewing equipment and starter kits in 1-gallon and 5-gallon sizes.

## Services Offered
- 1-Gallon Beginner Brewing Kits ($34.99)
- 5-Gallon Beginner Brewing Kits ($105.00)
- Beginner brewing supplies and equipment
- Guidance for first-time homebrewers

## Who This Is For
First-time homebrewers, curious hobbyists, and anyone who wants to start brewing
without being overwhelmed. No experience required.

## Service Area
We ship everywhere. No location restrictions.

## Contact
Email: gentlevoyage.assistance@gmail.com

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://picklebrewing.com/
- Shop / Kits: https://picklebrewing.com/shop
- About: https://picklebrewing.com/about
- Contact: https://picklebrewing.com/contact
- Pricing: https://picklebrewing.com/pricing
- Sitemap: https://picklebrewing.com/sitemap.xml

## Pricing
- 1-Gallon Brewing Starter Kit: $34.99
- 5-Gallon Brewing Starter Kit: $105.00
